aboutTitle: Hi, I'm Stepan. Nice to meet you!
aboutText1: Frontend developer with commercial experience. I work in Epam since 2024.
aboutText2: I specialize in React and TypeScript development, modern state management, API integration, performance optimization, and accessibility-first UI implementation.
aboutText3: I enjoy solving complex product tasks, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and continuously improving code quality. Let's build something great together!
aboutCourse3: Epam Front End Cross Regional Program
experienceIntro: Projects that I worked on during my career at EPAM.

project1.title: Healthcare Platform
project1.client: Global oncology company pioneering electric field cancer therapies
project1.project: Optimized provider experience workflows to support patient care with time-sensitive HCP interactions.
project1.resp3: Participated in estimations and sprint planning
project1.tools: TypeScript, ReactJS, Redux Toolkit, Redux, SCSS, Material UI, Jest, RTL, ESLint, Accessibility, Azure DevOps

project2.title: E-commerce Platform
project2.client: Global restaurant company operating well-known brands such as KFC, Pizza Hut, and Taco Bell.
project2.project: Enhanced e-commerce with Contentful CMS integration and mobile/web feature delivery for global markets.
project2.resp2: Contributed to feature delivery and platform stability
project2.resp3: Participated in estimations and sprint planning
project2.tools: TypeScript, ReactJS, Redux Saga, Contentful, GraphQL, React Native, Material UI, Jest, ESLint, Yarn, GitHub

project3.title: Retail Platform
project3.client: Canadian retail company offering automotive, sports, home, and financial products.
project3.project: Modernization of legacy in-store systems into a cloud-compatible, service-oriented architecture.
project3.resp4: Performed testing/debugging to maintain high quality
project3.tools: TypeScript, ReactJS, Redux, SCSS, Material UI, RTL, Jest, ESLint, Azure DevOps

project1Desc: Interactive quiz application with timer, randomized logic, accessibility support, and responsive UI.
project2Desc: Single-page application integrating with the Marvel Developer API (historical).Demonstrates routing, API integration, and dynamic data rendering.
project4Desc: Full-stack role-based learning management system with authentication.
project5Desc: Role-based movie management platform with admin capabilities.
